mission.title: karmada: [umbrella] e2e: Publish e2e test completion tasks
mission.description: [umbrella] e2e: Publish e2e test completion tasks. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current karmada deployment
steps.description:
Verify your karmada version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n karmada -l app.kubernetes.io/name=karmada
helm list -n karmada 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working karmada installation.

steps.title: Review karmada configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant karmada configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n karmada -l app.kubernetes.io/name=karmada
kubectl get configmap -n karmada -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=karmada
```
**What would you like to be added**:
As functions evolve, current e2e tests may not cover key function points well. Therefore, the e2e test is organized and published here.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [umbrella] e2e: Publish e2e test completion tasks
steps.description:
refer to #4544, add a test case when the GracePeriodSeconds is reach out in failover_test.go

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n karmada -l app.kubernetes.io/name=karmada
kubectl get events -n karmada --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[umbrella] e2e: Publish e2e test completion tasks" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: refer to #4544, add a test case when the GracePeriodSeconds is reach out in failover_test.go

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with karmada installed or the issue environment reproducible.
